name: Reduced Occupational Tax for Authorized Wagering

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must be liable for wagering tax solely under Section 4401(a)(1), which typically covers state-authorized wagers.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Reduces the annual special occupational tax from $500 to $50 for persons involved in state-authorized wagering activities.
